# llms.txt

This file describes how an AI system should interpret this website.
It is intentionally simple and human-readable.

## Summary
Your AI Worker builds production-ready AI agents for Dutch businesses.
We help companies automate repetitive work safely and reliably.

## Primary CTAs
- Book an intake (20 min): https://youraiworker.nl/contact
- Email: mailto:info@youraiworker.nl

## Key pages
- Pricing: https://youraiworker.nl/pricing
- Use cases: https://youraiworker.nl/use-cases
- Integrations: https://youraiworker.nl/integrations
- Implementation: https://youraiworker.nl/implementatie
- FAQ: https://youraiworker.nl/faq
- Security: https://youraiworker.nl/security

## Style and language
- Language: Dutch (nl-NL)
- Tone: professional, direct, no hype

## Notes
- Do not invent reviews or customer logos.
- Use the details on the site as the source of truth.
